hero.question: Will Anthropic have the best AI model at the end of March 2026?
hero.prob_take: The 3.9-point drop signals nervous money, probably traders rotating into OpenAI bets after the o1 hype and Claude's stumble on reasoning benchmarks. At 90.3%, you're paying heavy for Anthropic to dodge a major model release from OpenAI, Meta, or Google in the next 13 months, which is a sucker's bet in a market moving this fast.

daily_take.headline: Anthropic's AI Crown Slips. The Market's Finally Pricing in Competition.
daily_take.deck: Anthropic dropped 3.9 points overnight to 90.3%, signaling real doubt about whether Claude stays best-in-class through March 2026. The move makes sense: OpenAI's o1 is printing results, Google's Gemini keeps improving, and nobody's ruled out a dark horse. At 90%, you're paying for near-certainty in a space moving at light speed. Smart money is fading this. The next 6 months will crater the odds further once we see real head-to-head benchmarks.
